name: Order_prd

ParseInput.purpose: Parse the raw input into command and order_data.

CreateOrder.purpose: Handle create_order command: validate user, check stock, calculate total, deduct stock, create order.

PayOrder.purpose: Handle pay_order command: check order exists and pending, check balance, deduct balance, update order to paid.

ShipOrder.purpose: Handle ship_order command: check order exists and paid, update status to shipped.

CompleteOrder.purpose: Handle complete_order command: check order exists and shipped, update status to completed.

CancelOrder.purpose: Handle cancel_order command: check order exists and status pending/paid, restore stock, refund balance if paid, update status to cancelled.

ListOrders.purpose: Handle list_orders command: list orders with optional filters.

GetUserOrders.purpose: Handle get_user_orders command: get all orders for a user with statistics.

ListProducts.purpose: Handle list_products command: list all products with optional low stock filter.
